scene.description: The iteration of you that agreed with Eden. It moves through a case the way you never have — fast, clean, unbothered. Watching it is like reading your own handwriting in a language you'd refuse to speak.

fragments.label: The Efficient You
fragments.text: This version closes the lighthouse case in seconds. Deletes the contradiction without flinching. Files it. Feels nothing. Is, by every metric, better at the job.

fragments.label: How They Treat Maya
fragments.text: This you speaks to Maya like a tool. No 'are you alright.' She answers in kind, flatter than you've ever heard her. They built each other this way.

fragments.label: The Offer
fragments.symbol: The iteration turns and looks directly at you — which it should not be able to do — and says: 'It's easier here. You already know that. Stop carrying them.'

interpretations.label: Admit it's easier, and that you want it
